framework.name: AAuth Grant (draft-rosenberg-oauth-aauth-00)
framework.description: Agent Authorization Grant specifically designed so LLM hallucination cannot result in tokens being issued for the wrong user. Separates agent identity from user delegation.
framework.raw_quote: Agent Authorization Grant designed so that LLM hallucination cannot result in tokens being issued for the wrong user

source.title: IETF Draft: AI Agent Auth & Authz Framework - LinkedIn
